name: Asahi Eito Co., Ltd.
summary: Asahi Eito Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of sanitary and washroom equipment. The company's products include bathroom vanities, makeup mirrors, wash bowls, faucet fittings, sit toilets, toilet counters, hand washbasin, toilet accessories, urinals, simple and non-flush toilets, and drainage fitting. It also offers furniture and kitchen products. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
